notes: FROZEN: Mistral Vibe has a blocking tool-approval prompt (an ASK tool without --yolo), but the held prompt is a live TUI-only state — an in-memory asyncio.Future (_pending_approval) resolved by a Textual widget — never written to the watched messages.jsonl. _save_messages() flushes only AFTER _perform_llm_turn() completes, so the assistant tool_calls line AND the tool result land together AFTER approval; while the prompt is held the daemon sees a write-gap classified as working, never waiting (no hook→rule0 dead; generic open tool call not in NeedsUserAttention or OpenToolStalled). daemon=incapable → no recording. No phases beyond meta.
